en.name: Level 44 — Corroding Retail Outlet
en.shortDescription: An abandoned retail space with non-Euclidean geometry, creeping corrosive liquid, and windows showing Frontrooms imagery.
en.atmosphere: Empty desolate retail under partial light, dark corners and moans from above, thick with anxiety and architectural impossibility.
en.tips: Don't explore long — stay near the entrance. Avoid the dark. Beware the fast-spreading corrosive fluid and the silhouette entity.
